title: Ultimate Spear
description: Adds the Minecraft Live 2025 Spears with a focus on keeping accuracy on the features we currently know!
body:
# Ultimate Spear (Paper)
Ultimate Spear is a plugin for paper 1.21(all versions) that adds the new Spear from Minecraft Live 2025 to Minecraft!

# Attributes
Spear has 1 extra block of reach, but has a 1 second cooldown on every normal hit.

## Spears have two attacks:
### •Jab Attack (Left Click)

 •1 block of extra reach
 
### •Charge Attack (Hold Right Click)

•While holding it, you won´t be able to attack with right-click

•Everything that gets in your crosshair will get hit

•The damage dealt depends on the speed between you and your victim Examples: If your victim is moving towards you, damage = speed If you are moving towards your victim, damage = speed If you both are moving towards eachother, damage = speed x 2

•If you hold the spear for too long, it will enter a cooldown state

•Heavier tiers (like netherite) last less than weaker tiers (like gold or wood)

![spear charge attack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce209a821bc1f07cb4fc8a57567c65c46f01fd67_0.webp)![all spears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c7c5468bbcb14518a9c1c7394b21c11e1d8b4b3.png)![all spears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6ba8c60bdf9a60644785234d191829d7d41fbbb_0.webp)![spear in player hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de53a883c6cfaea70cd2d1de10dfbd1f99409087_0.webp)
